sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53643" key="kaswri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰσωρ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53643.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fornicator</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
